user_stories.title: Webview Chat Layout Mode
user_stories.description: Integrate the webview chat layout from tui_old.rs into the TUI. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/ui/webview/ directory with mod.rs re-exporting sub-modules. Split into: header.rs (render_webview_header), sidebar.rs (render_webview_sidebar), chat.rs (render_webview_chat_center), input.rs (render_webview_input), layout.rs (ChatLayoutMode enum + layout splitting). Each file MUST be under 50 non-blank lines. Add ChatLayoutMode enum (Classic, Webview) to a new file (NOT state.rs). In src/tui/ui/main.rs add ONLY a match arm that calls webview::render() — do not add rendering logic there. Add /webview and /classic slash commands by adding a small handler module. Wire Ctrl+B keybinding. Reference: tui_old.rs lines 9642-10210. src/tui/feature_extracted/webview.rs has a partial port. Do NOT read all of tui_old.rs.
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/ui/webview/ directory exists with mod.rs + at least 4 sub-files
Every new file is under 50 non-blank lines
ChatLayoutMode enum exists in its own file
Existing files (state.rs, main.rs, event_handlers.rs) grow by at most 10 lines each
/webview and /classic slash commands toggle the layout mode
Ctrl+B toggles between Classic and Webview
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Agent Identity System
user_stories.description: Integrate the agent identity system. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/agent_identity/ directory with mod.rs + sub-modules. Split into: profiles.rs (AgentProfile struct + known profiles), avatars.rs (avatar mapping), format.rs (format_agent_identity, format_agent_profile_summary). Each file MUST be under 50 non-blank lines. mod.rs re-exports public items. Reference: tui_old.rs lines 10955-11118 and src/tui/feature_extracted/agent_identity.rs.
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/agent_identity/ directory with mod.rs + sub-files
Every new file is under 50 non-blank lines
AgentProfile struct exists with personality and avatar fields
agent_profile() returns profiles for known agent names
Module declared in src/tui/mod.rs (1 line addition only)
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Inspector Panel View
user_stories.description: Add an inspector panel showing tool call metrics, token usage, and latency. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/ui/inspector/ directory with mod.rs + sub-modules. Split into: metrics.rs (token/cost display widgets), tool_history.rs (tool call list rendering), layout.rs (inspector panel layout). Each file MUST be under 50 non-blank lines. Add ViewMode::Inspector variant — put in a tiny new file or extend the existing enum with 1 line. Add /inspector slash command via a small handler. Reference: tui_old.rs lines 9892-10161.
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/ui/inspector/ directory with mod.rs + sub-files
Every new file is under 50 non-blank lines
Inspector displays model name, token counts, tool call history
/inspector slash command toggles the view
Existing files grow by at most 10 lines
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Autochat Relay Integration
user_stories.description: Wire the autochat relay system into the TUI event loop. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/app/autochat/ directory with mod.rs + sub-modules. Split into: events.rs (AutochatUiEvent enum), state.rs (autochat state fields), handler.rs (event loop handler for AutochatUiEvent), worker.rs (adapted relay worker startup). Each file MUST be under 50 non-blank lines. Do NOT copy the full 1200-line worker — create a thin wrapper that delegates to existing relay/session infrastructure. AppState changes: add only autochat_running: bool and autochat_rx channel (2 lines to state.rs). Reference: tui_old.rs lines 2136-3340 (but ADAPT, don't copy).
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/app/autochat/ directory with mod.rs + sub-files
Every new file is under 50 non-blank lines
AutochatUiEvent enum defined in events.rs
AppState grows by at most 5 lines
/autochat slash command starts the relay worker
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Clipboard Image Support
user_stories.description: Integrate clipboard image paste support. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/clipboard.rs (single file, under 50 lines). Contains get_clipboard_image() -> Option<ImageAttachment>. Wire a Ctrl+V handler in event_handlers.rs (add at most 10 lines to existing file). The function checks for clipboard image content and converts to ImageAttachment. Reference: tui_old.rs line 636 and src/tui/feature_extracted/clipboard.rs.
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/clipboard.rs exists and is under 50 non-blank lines
get_clipboard_image() returns Option<ImageAttachment>
Ctrl+V paste handler added (max 10 lines to event_handlers.rs)
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Smart Model Switch on Provider Errors
user_stories.description: Integrate smart switch for automatic model fallback on provider errors. ARCHITECTURE: Check src/tui/app/smart_switch.rs — it may already have most logic. If gaps exist, create small helper files under src/tui/app/smart_switch/ directory. Key functions: is_retryable_provider_error, smart_switch_preferred_models, smart_switch_model_key. If smart_switch.rs already works, mark done. If it needs additions, split into sub-modules under 50 lines each. Reference: tui_old.rs lines 3597-3611 and 10854-10930.
acceptance_criteria: is_retryable_provider_error() identifies rate limits, timeouts, 503s
smart_switch_preferred_models() returns fallback models
On retryable error, TUI switches model and retries
Any new files are under 50 non-blank lines
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes

user_stories.title: Watchdog Stalled Request Recovery
user_stories.description: Integrate watchdog for stalled request detection. ARCHITECTURE: Create src/tui/app/watchdog/ directory with mod.rs + sub-modules. Split into: state.rs (WatchdogNotification struct, watchdog state fields), detector.rs (check_watchdog_stall logic), handler.rs (cancel/retry key handlers), notification.rs (render_watchdog_notification UI widget). Each file MUST be under 50 non-blank lines. Add only 2-3 fields to AppState (watchdog_notification, processing_started_at if not already there). The event loop tick check should be at most 5 lines calling into detector.rs. Reference: tui_old.rs watchdog logic in event loop.
acceptance_criteria: src/tui/app/watchdog/ directory with mod.rs + sub-files
Every new file is under 50 non-blank lines
Watchdog detects stalled requests after configurable timeout
Notification UI renders with cancel/retry options
AppState grows by at most 5 lines
cargo check passes
bash check_file_limits.sh passes
